titleStmt.title: SII 29.104: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 104. (A.R. No. B. 769 of 1962-63.) AṆADUR, BIDAR TALUK, BIDAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Two faces of a slab lying in the grave yard behind the Hire-maṭha.
The record belongs to the first regnal year of the Chālukya king Jagadēkamalla II.

It states that a gift of lands, flower gardens, house-sites, income from taxes and oil mills for worship and offerings to god Nāraṇēśvaradēva of Aṇaṁdūr and for feeding Brāhmaṇas and ascetics in the choultry (sattra), by maṇḍalēśvara Baddarasa, the manneya, and mahāpradhāna, maneverggaḍe Bammaṇayya-daṇḍanāyaka, the sāmantikey-adhikāri of Ṟaṭṭale [Aṭṭale]-nāḍu under the orders of the king when, he visited the temple of Mahābhairava Maiḷāradēva in the first year of his rule and had the foot prints of the god Śrī Pādagaḷam installed in the temple. The record contains a long genealogical account of Baddarasa and mahāpradhāna Gopadēva-daṇḍanāyaka.

The record is dated Śaka 1059, Kāḷāyukti, Regnal year 1, Pushy śu. 15, uttarāyaṇa saṁkrānti. The cyclic year Kāḷāyukti occurred in Śaka 1060 and the given tithi corresponds to 1138 A.D., December 18, Sunday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdra cāmara cāravē trailōkyana
garāraṁbhaṁ mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . © svasti samasta bhuva
nāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭārakaṁ sa
tyāśraya kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmat pratāpa cakravarti jaga
dēkamalladēvaru paṭṭacaṁvōtsavaṁ māḍisikoṁḍu prathama rājyadalu śrī
manu mahābhairavaṁ maiḷāradēvara śrīpādagaḷaṁ dēvara
dēvālyakkeradu paṇaṁ māḍi Ālagna Āṇaṁdūra śrī nāraṇēśvaradēva
ra Aṁgabhōga raṁgabhōga naivēdyakkaṁ brāhmaṇargeṁ tapōdhanarggaṁ Aṁnnadā
nadādiyāgiṁ lesava kaṭṭaṁmāḍi mahāpradhānaṁ manerggaḍe ṟaṭṭaḷenāḍa
sāmaṁtikeyadhikāri bammaṇayya daṁḍanāyakargge vānāḍamaṁneyaṁ maṁ
ḍaḷēśvara baddhara rasa mmukhā dēśadiṁ besagaleṁtavaru sahitaṁ dā
rāpūrvakaṁ māḍidapa . A tithiyeṁtene sakavarṣaṁ sāsiradayvattoṁbhattaneya 1059
ttaneya kāḷāyukta saṁvatsarada puṣyada paurṇṇamāsya vyatīpāta Uttarāyaṇa saṁkrāṁti
yaṁdu biṭṭa datti mattaṁ mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ baddarasana vaṁśāvatāramu
madarāpradhānaṁ gōpadēva daṁḍanāyakana vaṁśāvatāra veṁteṁdare — ramanā
yaṁ kaṟegoṁkabhūpasutanappa baddagōrvvēra gamanōkārada rājyamaṁ nilisi
daṁ nārāyaṇaṁ tatsutaṁ kramamirataṁ mavagaṁdu baddarasaraṁ śrīma
llidēvaṁge rājyamane pūrjjitamāge mādanegaḷdaṁ gōpaṁda daṁḍādhipa . kaṁ . calada
ḻigaṁḍanaṁ nirmmaḷaneriya nāvika dāna ciṁntāmaṇiyaṁ kalikāla karnnaṁ nabhōvaḷe
yaṁ dorṇṇipudu gōpadaṁḍādhipana . Innā pogaḷteveḍeda gōpadēva daṁḍanāya
ka śathaśārdhatādapunteḷāḍe . vri . śrīlatitāraṇa surēṁdra mahīru
hamūrtti viśvavidyallaḷankāricanū bidyāmaṇi dudhṛradhairya mādāpahaṁ jū
śvaḷanarakṣa nētṛmaḷa kīrtti(su)dāndharthayōga nidrālasa pakṣalō
bhana sarōruhanāgi mukuṁda nirppudu . ka . tadamaḷanābhi sarōṁcadoḷu
dayisidaṁ (vi)dma(po)vevi(trō)ji caturvvadana samasta vidyā (sa)danaṁ mudadiṁ
hiraṇyagarbbhaṁ brahma(ṁ) Enisida hiraṇyagarbbha samānaḥ ssaṁlōjatēnāḷa
pārbuda nikāya meṁti(pi) rūpya janiṟusitene Avaroḷadhikanādi
vaḍaśiṣṭha maniva śi vināyvanava vaśiṣṭha gōtra mārātra dāḷpviṁ
tanupama māśira baḷi kaṁ yisidaṁdā śrīpogaḷe bā
ṇabhaṭṭa . Ādādyanā bhaṭṭaṁgada bōdhoḷā Aḍita(lidyā) na dana tiḷakaṁśrī (pi)
ya sinereye kīrttha śrībaḷayatuḷābdhi caṁdranogedanupēṁdra . vri .
tattanujaṁ triḷōbana dharāmaṁnātana sūnubikramā dāltayaśa(dbaḍivēsari)
negaḷdaṁ prabhu bammadēvanarōtta manātanagrajanupēṁdrā nupēṁdra ma
hādvijaṁge lōkōttamanā mahēśvaranē puṭṭidanaṁtenipa mahēśvara .
va . Antu pratāparoḷu mahēśvaranenisida mahēśvaraṁga Umādē(vi)
samānavenisida bhaṁganobbera . vri . Akaḷaṁkā caraṇakkaḷaṁ karaṇamā
dārdviṁgaḍappaṁ dupēṁdra kuḷāṁ bō nidhivarddhanarge sasiyoṁdugrāri kāṁtāra
pāvakaṁ neḍujvaḷa kīrttiyaṁdu guṇiyeṁdi bhūtadaṁ kūrttu baṇṇiku(ṁ) veṁdaṁḍa
negarttivetta maganā gōvirudādipu . vri . śrīmantabhōga niḷayaṁ vi ṁ
gāydaṇa daṁḍanātha cūḍāmaṇigaṁ samasta guṇaśīḷa samanvite pākaṇabbe gaṁpra
ma(dē) huṭṭidaṁ negaḷda nāraṇadēvanupēṁdra vaṁśajōddhānu guṇādhikaṁ paḍava dēvanu
śaratara daṇḍanāthanu . ṁ . Avaroḷage . v® .

— Ā prathama pratāpana sahāya dhārākramanāśritāśra
yaṁ viprakuḷāṁbara dyumaṇi maṁtrisikhāmaṇi pūjitaṁ vaśiṣṭha pra
vara prabhūtananavadya caritrananūnadhāna kīrtti priyaneṁduṁ baṇṇi
pudiḷāvaḷayaṁ vibhu nāraṇayyana . kaṁ . Ātana kulavadhu
bhāmagiri dharegaruṁdhati garatige raṁbhege dharaṇī jātege sāvitri
ge paḍhi bhūtaḷadoḷu tāne (gi)riya dēviyanippaḷu . va . Anteśauryya
doḷu nārāyaṇanenisida nārāyaṇaṁ darṁmāta niviśāḷavakṣasthaḷa nivāsini
yenisida giriyā dēvige . kaṁ . Udaya girīṁdrada sikharadoḷudiyi
sudādityanaṁte nijakuḷanaḷinī mudavādave vaṁśavarddhananudayisidaṁ gōpa
dēvadaṁḍādhīśa . vri . Ānolleṁ maranāgi (vaḻti)pudaneṁdiṁdrādu
masigadiṁ nānoleṁ brugavāganeṁderaḍu voṁmeyyāgi gō
viṁdanaṁbenāmaṁ biḍidāvagaṁ manuja rūpāgirdda vāriddaḷuṁtānārbbaṁ bhu
ja vikramāṁnatikeyiṁ gōviṁda (daṁ)ḍādhipa . śrī nāraṇēśvara dēvargge
pūje naivēdya jīrṇṇōddhāra nimittavāgi biṭṭadatti yeṁtene baḍagalu
gurukuṁdeya sthaḷadalli kebiṭaṇada gaḍiṁ (badalidu) sahitavāgi nigarta
kōla mattaru Eraḍu 2 Ūriṁ teṁka keṟeya kelagaṇa gadde kōla matta
ru Eraḍu 2 Ūriṁ mūḍalu hūdōṭiṁ kōla mattaru mūṟu 3 mattaṁ
brāhmaṇargge tapōdhanarge bhōjanakke biṭṭa satraveṁteṁdaḍe Ūriṁ paḍuvalu
giṇigeyereyaliddaḷupahithavāgi nigaraṁ kōlamattaru Era
ḍu 2 mattaṁ dēvargge biṭṭakkayadeṁnteṁdaḍe Ūralā māḍida bhūmi
yalli nigavaṁ (kō)la mattaroṁdake pratyēka draṁmma Era
ḍuṁ binugumaḍiyalli pratyēka dramma (1) dēvara muṁntaṇa
keli Eraḍu gāṇa Eraḍu mattaṁ brāhmaṇa vritti
Ippattakeṁ 20 biṭṭa dattiyeṁtene pratyēkaṁ nivēśana Agala
veṁdu niḷaṁ haṁnneraḍu 12 kayyagalu Aṁtā nivēśana
kke kaṁtidu kōla mattaru Āṟu 6 gadde mattaroṁdu 1 karaṁbi
kōla mattaru Ippattu 20 Alliṁ bināṇi basavaṁge karidu
kōla mattaru Āṟu 6 Ā mattaralu gadde mattaru 1 karaṁba
ṟa . 7 . © svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vāyō harētu vasuṁdharā
ṣaṣṭirvvarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
© grāmēkaṁ ratni kāmēkaṁ bhūmiradyēka maṁgulaṁ haraṁ
naraka māpnōti yāvadā bhūta saṁpavaṁ . © © © .
Iṁta dhammamaṁ rakṣisidāraṁ vāraṇāsiyalu gō saha
sra liṁga sahasra brāhmaṇa sahasravaṁ nilisidaṁ Akṣa
ya puṇyavaṁ paḍeva Ī dharmmavaṁ keḍisida nappaḍe vāraṇā
siyalu sahasraliṁga bhēdamuṁ sahasra brahmāti
yuṁ gōvadhe sahasravaṁ māḍida Akṣayanarakavaṁ
paḍeva maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 29.104 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
